---
name: Bug report
about: Create a report to help us improve the AI Triage system
title: '[BUG] '
labels: bug
assignees: ''

---

**Describe the bug**
A clear and concise description of what the bug is. E.g., The AI ignores the triage rule when given a very short prompt.

**To Reproduce**
Steps to reproduce the behavior:
1. Setup the prompt '...'
2. Give the AI the input '....'
3. See error (AI skips reading SKILL.md)

**Expected behavior**
A clear and concise description of what you expected to happen.

**Screenshots/Logs**
If applicable, add screenshots or AI chat logs to help explain your problem.

**Environment:**
 - AI Model [e.g. Claude 3.5 Sonnet, GPT-4o]
 - IDE/Platform [e.g. Cursor, VS Code, Web]
 
**Additional context**
Add any other context about the problem here.
